prompt: Create a dreamy impressionist oil painting of a serene misty lake at sunrise, in a wide cinematic horizontal canvas. The scene shows one elegant blue-gray heron standing in shallow water slightly right of center, surrounded by reeds and lily pads, with its full reflection visible in the calm water. Use a soft pastel dawn palette: peach, coral, lavender, pale yellow, turquoise, and muted blue-green, with the rising sun glowing near the center horizon and reflecting in a vertical path across the lake. On the right bank, paint one graceful willow-like tree covered in pale pink blossoms, its drooping branches hanging over the water; add hazy forest silhouettes and low morning mist across the far shoreline. Include exactly 17 distinct water-lily blossoms: 4 clustered in the lower-left foreground, 3 near the center around the heron, and 10 scattered across the right foreground and midground among lily pads. Add many rounded green lily pads and tall reeds, but keep the composition peaceful and uncluttered. Style: romantic painterly landscape, visible brushstrokes, soft edges, atmospheric depth, luminous reflections, no text, no people, no buildings. Customizable elements: blue-gray heron, sunrise, pale pink and white, impressionist oil painting, peaceful and dreamy.
